**Version:** 2.3.0  
**Last Updated:** 2026-04-06T18:00:00+08:00  
**Status:** Active

---

## Endpoints

### GET /projects

Retrieve a list of projects with optional filtering and pagination.

#### Request Format

```http
GET /projects?status={status}&page={page}&limit={limit}&sort={sort}
```

#### Query Parameters

| Parameter | Type   | Required | Description                                      |
|-----------|--------|----------|--------------------------------------------------|
| status    | string | No       | Filter by project status: `active`, `archived`, `draft` |
| page      | integer| No       | Page number (default: 1)                         |
| limit     | integer| No       | Items per page (default: 20, max: 100)          |
| sort      | string | No       | Sort field: `created_at`, `updated_at`, `name` (default: `created_at`) |
| order     | string | No       | Sort order: `asc`, `desc` (default: `desc`)      |

#### Request Example

```http
GET /projects?status=active&page=1&limit=10&sort=updated_at&order=desc
Authorization: Bearer {access_token}
Content-Type: application/json
```

#### Response Format

**Success Response (200 OK)**

```json
{
  "success": true,
  "data": {
    "projects": [
      {
        "id": "proj_1234567890",
        "name": "E-commerce Platform Migration",
        "description": "Migrate legacy e-commerce system to microservices architecture",
        "status": "active",
        "owner": {
          "id": "user_9876543210",
          "name": "Alex Zhang",
          "email": "alex.zhang@oriontech.com"
        },
        "team": [
          {
            "id": "user_1111111111",
            "name": "Sarah Chen",
            "role": "lead_developer"
          },
          {
            "id": "user_2222222222",
            "name": "Mike Johnson",
            "role": "developer"
          }
        ],
        "created_at": "2026-03-15T09:30:00+08:00",
        "updated_at": "2026-04-05T16:45:00+08:00",
        "start_date": "2026-03-15",
        "target_end_date": "2026-06-30",
        "progress_percentage": 35
      }
    ],
    "pagination": {
      "current_page": 1,
      "total_pages": 5,
      "total_items": 47,
      "items_per_page": 10,
      "has_next": true,
      "has_prev": false
    }
  },
  "meta": {
    "request_id": "req_abc123def456",
    "timestamp": "2026-04-06T10:30:00+08:00"
  }
}
```

### POST /projects

Create a new project.

#### Request Format

```http
POST /projects
Authorization: Bearer {access_token}
Content-Type: application/json
```

#### Request Body

```json
{
  "name": "Project Name",
  "description": "Project description",
  "owner_id": "user_9876543210",
  "team_ids": ["user_1111111111", "user_2222222222"],
  "start_date": "2026-04-10",
  "target_end_date": "2026-07-15"
}
```

#### Request Body Schema

| Field           | Type   | Required | Description                                      |
|-----------------|--------|----------|--------------------------------------------------|
| name            | string | Yes      | Project name (3-100 characters)                  |
| description     | string | No       | Project description (max 1000 characters)        |
| owner_id        | string | Yes      | User ID of the project owner                     |
| team_ids        | array  | No       | Array of user IDs to add to the project team     |
| start_date      | string | No       | Project start date (ISO 8601 date format)        |
| target_end_date | string | No       | Target completion date (ISO 8601 date format)    |

#### Response Example (201 Created)

```json
{
  "success": true,
  "data": {
    "id": "proj_new123456",
    "name": "AI Recommendation Engine",
    "description": "Build ML-powered product recommendation system",
    "status": "draft",
    "owner": {
      "id": "user_9876543210",
      "name": "Alex Zhang",
      "email": "alex.zhang@oriontech.com"
    },
    "team": [],
    "created_at": "2026-04-06T10:35:00+08:00",
    "updated_at": "2026-04-06T10:35:00+08:00",
    "start_date": "2026-04-10",
    "target_end_date": "2026-07-15",
    "progress_percentage": 0
  },
  "meta": {
    "request_id": "req_xyz789abc012",
    "timestamp": "2026-04-06T10:35:00+08:00"
  }
}
```

### GET /projects/{id}

Retrieve a single project by ID.

#### Request Format

```http
GET /projects/{id}
Authorization: Bearer {access_token}
Content-Type: application/json
```

#### Path Parameters

| Parameter | Type   | Required | Description           |
|-----------|--------|----------|-----------------------|
| id        | string | Yes      | Unique project ID     |

#### Response Example (200 OK)

```json
{
  "success": true,
  "data": {
    "id": "proj_1234567890",
    "name": "E-commerce Platform Migration",
    "description": "Migrate legacy e-commerce system to microservices architecture",
    "status": "active",
    "owner": {
      "id": "user_9876543210",
      "name": "Alex Zhang",
      "email": "alex.zhang@oriontech.com"
    },
    "team": [
      {
        "id": "user_1111111111",
        "name": "Sarah Chen",
        "role": "lead_developer"
      }
    ],
    "created_at": "2026-03-15T09:30:00+08:00",
    "updated_at": "2026-04-05T16:45:00+08:00",
    "start_date": "2026-03-15",
    "target_end_date": "2026-06-30",
    "progress_percentage": 35,
    "tasks_count": 24,
    "completed_tasks_count": 8
  },
  "meta": {
    "request_id": "req_def456ghi789",
    "timestamp": "2026-04-06T10:40:00+08:00"
  }
}
```

### PUT /projects/{id}

Update an existing project.

#### Request Format

```http
PUT /projects/{id}
Authorization: Bearer {access_token}
Content-Type: application/json
```

#### Request Body

{
  "name": "Updated Project Name",

  "status": "active",
  "target_end_date": "2026-08-15"
}
```

#### Response Example (200 OK)

```json
{
  "success": true,
  "data": {
    "id": "proj_1234567890",
    "name": "Updated Project Name",
    "description": "Updated description",
    "status": "active",
